word: G3970 - πατροπαράδοτος - patroparádotos - pat-rop-ar-ad'-ot-os - Received by tradition from fathers

sections.paragraph:
πατροπαράδοτος - patroparadotos - pat-rop-ar-ad'-ot-os

From G3962 and a derivative of G3860 (in the sense of handing over or down); traditionary: - received by tradition from fathers.
